extraction.one_line_summary: POGAČAR attacked on the descent from Selvino with 15km to go, built a 1-minute gap despite cramping at 12km, and soloed to his third consecutive Lombardia victory.
tactical_patterns: POGAČAR attacked on Selvino descent not summit, reversing his 2021 weakness on same 19-hairpin descent with superior bike handling.
YATES Adam initiated selection with 40km remaining, forcing EVENEPOEL out before POGAČAR countered—UAE used Yates as sacrifice pawn.
CARAPAZ isolated despite Olympic form; no INEOS domestiques survived to Alpine climbs, exposing depth weakness vs UAE/Jumbo models.
EVENEPOEL dropped early on first major selection suggests Monument-distance climbing durability remains exploitable weakness for rivals.

rider_signals.POGAČAR Tadej: positive: survived cramp crisis at 12km out with 45-second gap, showing ability to manage physical collapse mid-winning move
rider_signals.EVENEPOEL Remco: negative: distanced when YATES Adam accelerated with 40km remaining, never rejoined elite group despite strong domestique support
rider_signals.ROGLIČ Primož: positive: finished third in final Jumbo-Visma race, podiuming despite no visible team support after YATES selection
rider_signals.BAGIOLI Andrea: positive: finished second from late chase group, showing Monument podium capacity without relying on team leadership
rider_signals.YATES Adam: positive: triggered winning selection 40km out, UAE willing to sacrifice him early to isolate rivals before POGAČAR counter
rider_signals.CARAPAZ Richard: negative: finished seventh despite Olympic champion form, INEOS depth failed to deliver support on penultimate climbs
rider_signals.MAS Enric: negative: first major casualty before decisive climbing, suggests Monument distance remains physical ceiling
